svg.text: Steve Griffing, PE(CSE), CISSP-ISSEP, CPP · CC BY 4.0 · 2026
CF-PETG nacelle pods · PETG nozzle parts · gear
Hull: Peter Farell CC BY 4.0 · Nozzle: BamJr CC BY 4.0 · Visual inspiration: Firefly/Serenity © Joss Whedon/Mutant Enemy/Universal — Fan engineering work
Print nacelle pods: CF-PETG, 40% gyroid, 0.15mm, 4 walls
Print nozzle inner rings vertically (layer lines ⊥ to axis)
Print nozzle flaps FLAT on bed (no support needed)
Print sector gears at 0.12mm for tooth accuracy
Print tilt brackets: CF-PETG, 4 walls, 40% infill
Sector gear tooth accuracy is critical — use 0.10mm layer if possible
BamJr nozzle remix CC BY 4.0 — see LICENSE_AND_ATTRIBUTION.md
